ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the experiment (e.g., D54, D55) */,
  "meanA" REAL /* Mean value of parameter A */,
  "OD" REAL /* Optical density (OD) value */,
  "GSH" REAL /* Glutathione (GSH) value */,
  "protein_a" REAL /* Protein A value */,
  "protein_b" REAL /* Protein B value */,
  "CS_activity" REAL /* CS activity value */,
  "ploidy" TEXT /* Ploidy value */,
  "trt_list" TEXT /* Treatment list */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research group conducting the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the research group */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institution the group is affiliated with */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the experimental condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition value */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., molecular, cellular) */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* More detailed description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., csv, tsv, json) */,
  "compression" TEXT /* Indicates if the file is compressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., txt, md) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research group the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash linking the version to a specific commit in a version control system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "group_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first research group */,
  "group_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second research group */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was established */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, ended) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_group_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("group_id1") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_group_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("group_id2") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id")
)
